problem_statement: Given a string s, find the minimum number of insertions needed to make it a palindrome. A palindrome is a sequence that reads the same backward as forward. You can insert characters at any position in the string.

examples.explanation: Insert 2 characters "c", and "b" to make "abcacba", which is a palindrome.
Insert "a" at the beginning to make "aba", which is a palindrome.
